import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api';const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Experts API
export const expertAPI={getExperts:function(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;let limit=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:10;let category=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:null;let search=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:'';let url="/experts?page=".concat(page,"&limit=").concat(limit);if(category&&category!=='All')url+="&category=".concat(category);if(search)url+="&search=".concat(search);return apiClient.get(url);},getExpertById:id=>apiClient.get("/experts/".concat(id)),createExpert:data=>apiClient.post('/experts',data),login:data=>apiClient.post('/experts/login',data)};// Time Slots API
export const timeSlotsAPI={getTimeSlots:function(expertId){let date=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:null;let url="/time-slots/".concat(expertId,"/slots");if(date)url+="?date=".concat(date);return apiClient.get(url);},createTimeSlots:data=>apiClient.post('/time-slots',data),updateTimeSlot:(id,data)=>apiClient.patch("/time-slots/".concat(id),data)};// Bookings API
export const bookingsAPI={createBooking:data=>apiClient.post('/bookings',data),getBookings:email=>apiClient.get("/bookings?email=".concat(email)),getBookingsByExpertId:expertId=>apiClient.get("/bookings?expertId=".concat(expertId)),getBookingById:id=>apiClient.get("/bookings/".concat(id)),updateBookingStatus:(id,data)=>apiClient.patch("/bookings/".concat(id,"/status"),data),cancelBooking:id=>apiClient.patch("/bookings/".concat(id,"/cancel"))};export default apiClient;
